summary.finance: U.S. CMBS delinquency rate rose to 7.55% in March 2026 (Trepp), reversing February's decline.
summary.art: Chiharu Shiota's 'Two Home Countries' exhibition holds member preview today at Asian Art Museum, San Francisco.

market_highlights: Trepp CMBS delinquency rate increased 41bps to 7.55% in March.
Lodging sector saw largest jump in delinquency, up 137bps.
KBRA-rated U.S. CMBS delinquency rate rose to 7.7%.
art_highlights: Asian Art Museum (SF) members preview: Chiharu Shiota's 'Two Home Countries'.
Public opening for Shiota's exhibition starts April 3rd.
